---
id: get-resource
title: "Get resource"
sidebar_label: "Get resource"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/orchestration-cluster-api-rest/specifications/orchestration-cluster-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MarkerAddedInVersion from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerAddedInVersion";

import MarkerEventuallyConsistentExtension from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerEventuallyConsistentExtension";

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"}>
  {"Get resource"} <MarkerAddedInVersion version="8.7" />
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/resources/{resourceKey}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

<MarkerEventuallyConsistentExtension />

Returns a deployed resource.
:::info
This endpoint does not return BPMN process definitions, DMN decision definitions, or form
resources. To query BPMN process definitions or DMN decision definitions, use their
respective APIs.
:::

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "resourceKey",
      in: "path",
      required: true,
      description: "The unique key identifying the resource.",
      schema: {
        type: "string",
        oneOf: [
          {
            description:
              "System-generated key for a deployed process definition.",
            format: "ProcessDefinitionKey",
            example: "2251799813686749",
            type: "string",
            allOf: [
              {
                description:
                  "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                type: "string",
                title: "LongKey",
              },
            ],
            title: "ProcessDefinitionKey",
          },
          {
            allOf: [
              {
                description:
                  "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                type: "string",
                title: "LongKey",
              },
            ],
            description:
              "System-generated key for a deployed decision requirements definition.",
            format: "DecisionRequirementsKey",
            example: "2251799813683346",
            type: "string",
            title: "DecisionRequirementsKey",
          },
          {
            description: "System-generated key for a deployed form.",
            format: "FormKey",
            example: "2251799813684365",
            type: "string",
            allOf: [
              {
                description:
                  "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                type: "string",
                title: "LongKey",
              },
            ],
            title: "FormKey",
          },
          {
            description: "System-generated key for a decision definition.",
            format: "DecisionDefinitionKey",
            example: "2251799813326547",
            type: "string",
            allOf: [
              {
                description:
                  "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                type: "string",
                title: "LongKey",
              },
            ],
            title: "DecisionDefinitionKey",
          },
        ],
        description: "The system-assigned key for this resource.",
        format: "ResourceKey",
        title: "ResourceKey",
      },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "The resource is successfully returned.",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: [
              "resourceName",
              "version",
              "versionTag",
              "resourceId",
              "tenantId",
              "resourceKey",
            ],
            properties: {
              resourceName: {
                description:
                  "The resource name from which this resource was parsed.",
                type: "string",
              },
              version: {
                description: "The assigned resource version.",
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
              },
              versionTag: {
                nullable: true,
                description: "The version tag of this resource.",
                type: "string",
              },
              resourceId: {
                description: "The resource ID of this resource.",
                type: "string",
              },
              tenantId: {
                description: "The tenant ID of this resource.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    example: "customer-service",
                    description: "The unique identifier of the tenant.",
                    format: "TenantId",
                    type: "string",
                    title: "TenantId",
                  },
                ],
              },
              resourceKey: {
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "string",
                    oneOf: [
                      {
                        description:
                          "System-generated key for a deployed process definition.",
                        format: "ProcessDefinitionKey",
                        example: "2251799813686749",
                        type: "string",
                        allOf: [
                          {
                            description:
                              "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                            type: "string",
                            title: "LongKey",
                          },
                        ],
                        title: "ProcessDefinitionKey",
                      },
                      {
                        allOf: [
                          {
                            description:
                              "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                            type: "string",
                            title: "LongKey",
                          },
                        ],
                        description:
                          "System-generated key for a deployed decision requirements definition.",
                        format: "DecisionRequirementsKey",
                        example: "2251799813683346",
                        type: "string",
                        title: "DecisionRequirementsKey",
                      },
                      {
                        description:
                          "System-generated key for a deployed form.",
                        format: "FormKey",
                        example: "2251799813684365",
                        type: "string",
                        allOf: [
                          {
                            description:
                              "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                            type: "string",
                            title: "LongKey",
                          },
                        ],
                        title: "FormKey",
                      },
                      {
                        description:
                          "System-generated key for a decision definition.",
                        format: "DecisionDefinitionKey",
                        example: "2251799813326547",
                        type: "string",
                        allOf: [
                          {
                            description:
                              "Zeebe Engine resource key (Java long serialized as string)",
                            type: "string",
                            title: "LongKey",
                          },
                        ],
                        title: "DecisionDefinitionKey",
                      },
                    ],
                    description: "The system-assigned key for this resource.",
                    format: "ResourceKey",
                    title: "ResourceKey",
                  },
                ],
                description: "The unique key of this resource.",
              },
            },
            title: "ResourceResult",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "A resource with the given key was not found.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
